translations.text: When the sky is torn apart,
when the stars are scattered,
when the seas burst forth,
when graves turn inside out:
each soul will know what it has done and what it has left undone.

text_qpc_hafs: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ مَا غَرَّكَ بِرَبِّكَ ٱلۡكَرِيمِ ٦
text_uthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مَا غَرَّكَ بِرَبِّكَ ٱلْكَرِيمِ

translations.text: Mankind, what has lured you away from God,
your generous Lord, who created you, shaped you, proportioned you,

text_qpc_hafs: فِيٓ أَيِّ صُورَةٖ مَّا شَآءَ رَكَّبَكَ ٨
text_uthmani: فِىٓ أَىِّ صُورَةٍ مَّا شَآءَ رَكَّبَكَ

translations.text: in whatever form He chose?
Yet you still take the Judgement to be a lie!
Over you stand
watchers, noble recorders
who know what you do:
the good will live in bliss,
and the wicked will burn in the Fire.
They will enter it on the Day of Judgement
and they will find no escape.
What will explain to you what the Day of Judgement is?

text_qpc_hafs: ثُمَّ مَآ أَدۡرَىٰكَ مَا يَوۡمُ ٱلدِّينِ ١٨
text_uthmani: ثُمَّ مَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ

translations.text: Yes! What will explain to you what the Day of Judgement is?

text_qpc_hafs: يَوۡمَ لَا تَمۡلِكُ نَفۡسٞ لِّنَفۡسٖ شَيۡـٔٗاۖ وَٱلۡأَمۡرُ يَوۡمَئِذٖ لِّلَّهِ ١٩
text_uthmani: يَوْمَ لَا تَمْلِكُ نَفْسٌ لِّنَفْسٍ شَيْـًٔا ۖ وَٱلْأَمْرُ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلَّهِ

translations.text: The Day when no soul will be able to do anything for another; on that Day, command will belong to God.
Woe to those who give short measure,

text_qpc_hafs: ٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ٱكۡتَالُواْ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ يَسۡتَوۡفُونَ ٢
text_uthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ٱكْتَالُوا۟ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ يَسْتَوْفُونَ

translations.text: who demand of other people full measure for themselves,
but give less than they should when it is they who weigh or measure for others!
Do these people not realize that they will be raised up
on a mighty Day,
a Day when everyone will stand before the Lord of the Worlds?
